title: Briaviodiol A, a New Cembranoid from a Soft Coral Briareum violacea
abstract: A new cembrane diterpenoid, briaviodiol A (1), has been isolated from a soft coral Briareum violacea. The structure of 1 was determined by spectroscopic methods and further confirmed by a single-crystal X-ray diffraction analysis.
subject: Coral
Chemistry
Stereochemistry
Terpenoid
Oceanography
Geology
